statements.impact_statement: Netty SslHandler resource exhaustion vulnerability via SSLEngine. This is a server-side vulnerability requiring an attacker to send malicious SSL/TLS data to a Netty server. Liquibase is a database migration CLI tool that does not run a TLS server. Netty is a transitive dependency from Azure SDK, Cassandra driver, and MongoDB driver — used only as a client-side transport for outbound connections.
